LanguageData.VQE_Protolancer.label: protolancer
LanguageData.VQE_Protolancer.description: An automated sniper drone purpose-built for medium and long-range engagement. It utilizes a powerful, single-shot lance sniper weapon to dispose of enemies from afar. Its lightweight construction allows for quick repositioning but makes it highly vulnerable to close-range attacks and melee combat.\n\nDrones have a limited lifespan and will begin malfunctioning as they near end-of-life, but can use standby mode to slow component degradation. Unlike other drones, protolancers don’t require connection to drone transmitters.
LanguageData.VQE_Protolancer.tools.0.label: shell spike
